title: Tuuna MultiSystem AI
description: Next-gen autonomous AI ecosystem for system operations, administrative automation, and multi-LLM orchestration.

details.fullDescription: Tuuna is a sophisticated AI-driven OS layer designed to automate complex system tasks. It integrates Gemini, Groq, and DeepSeek to provide the most efficient model for any given task, from code generation to real-time system monitoring and administrative data management.
features: Dynamic Multi-LLM Orchestration (Switching between Gemini/Groq/DeepSeek)
Autonomous OS Integration for system command execution
Encrypted Student & Administrator Management portals
Direct WhatsApp & CLI integration for remote system control
achievements: Successfully automated 80% of routine system admin tasks in local testing
Integrated 3 unique LLM providers into a unified response bridge
Architected a secure dual-auth management portal for educational institutions

title: Gov-NLP Complaint System
description: BERT-powered multi-lingual complaint automation system with intelligent routing and LLM response synthesis.

details.fullDescription: A production-grade NLP pipeline designed to modernize public grievance systems. The system classifies complaints in Hindi, Gujarati, and English, extracts core issues using NER, and uses advanced LLMs to draft tailored responses for administrative review.
features: Multi-language (Hindi, Gujarati, English) Sentiment & Intent Analysis
BERT-based priority classification for urgent public service issues
Automated routing engine to direct complaints to specific government departments
LLM-powered auto-reply generation for faster citizen communication
achievements: Achieved 94% classification accuracy across mixed-language datasets
Reduced manual complaint sorting time by an estimated 70%

title: MediScope AI
description: High-fidelity healthcare platform leveraging predictive ML models for disease diagnosis and medical analytics.

details.fullDescription: MediScope is an intelligent medical diagnostic tool that uses state-of-the-art machine learning to predict risks for chronic diseases. It provides a visual dashboard for doctors to analyze patient history and medical trends accurately.
features: Advanced predictive models for Cardiac and Diabetic risk assessment
Interactive patient health data visualization
EHR-compatible data ingestion pipeline
Secure, HIPAA-inspired data handling architecture
achievements: Validated models on Kaggle healthcare datasets with top-tier precision
Implemented a scalable feature engineering pipeline for medical time-series data

title: Cyberpunk OS Dashboard
description: A high-performance Chrome extension override featuring real-time data scraping and immersive UI aesthetics.

details.fullDescription: Transforming the standard browser experience into a Sci-Fi hacker workstation. This dashboard integrates real-time GitHub trending data, system health monitors, and aesthetic productivity tools wrapped in a stunning glassmorphic UI.
features: Real-time GitHub Trending & Tech News scraping engine
Fully responsive Cyberpunk 2077 inspired design system
Integrated productivity suite (Widgets, Calendar, Performance monitors)
3D Parallax and GPU-accelerated CSS animations
achievements: Developed a highly optimized scraping layer to ensure <200ms dashboard load time
Implemented a custom Glassmorphism 2.0 design framework

title: TuneX Hi-Fi Player
description: A responsive, Spotify-like music streaming platform with real-time audio visualization and discovery.

details.fullDescription: TuneX is a premium web application for high-fidelity audio streaming. It focuses on a fluid, gesture-based mobile experience and dynamic 3D audio visualization to make digital listening immersive.
features: Web Audio API powered real-time spectrum visualization
Automatic 'Up Next' discovery queue and playlist management
Fluid, mobile-first responsive design for all screen sizes
Optimized asset loading for seamless playback on low-bandwidth
achievements: Achieved 100/100 Lighthouse score for Performance and SEO
Architected a custom state management system for robust audio playback

title: Netflix Content Intelligence
description: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on Netflix's global content library to extract strategic media insights.

details.fullDescription: A deep dive into Netflix's viewing data, this project uncovers hidden content strategies, genre evolution over the last decade, and geographical production trends to provide actionable business intelligence.
features: Comprehensive EDA on 8,000+ content listings
In-depth genre popularity and seasonality trend mapping
Spatial analysis of content production by country
Recommendation logic prototyping based on genre similarity
achievements: Uncovered a 15% shift in genre production trends over the 2020-2024 period
Created a reusable data-cleaning pipeline for unstructured media metadata
